injuries.comment: Harley won't play Saturday (Nov. 15) versus the Flyers, Stars radio analyst Bruce LeVine reports, and the team adds he is week-to-week with a lower-body injury.
The Stars said that Lyubushkin is OUT for Tuesday's (Nov. 18) game versus the Islanders.
The Islanders said that Holmstrom is a game-time call for Tuesday's (Nov. 18) matchup versus the Stars.
